product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello, I'm very interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV you have listed. It looks fantastic! I was wondering if there might be any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV! It's a top-notch product indeed. While the retail price is $1,799, I can offer you a special price of $1,500 for it today.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: That's a good offer, but I was hoping to get it closer to $1,250. Would you be able to meet me there?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand where you're coming from, but I'm unable to go below our wholesale price of $1,100 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. However, I can still offer it to you at the discounted price of $1,500 if you'd like to proceed with the purchase.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the transparency regarding the wholesale price. Given that, would you be willing to meet me at $1,400?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your understanding. Since you've been a great customer, I can make an exception and offer you the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV for $1,400. It's a great deal considering all the amazing features it offers.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: That's a very tempting offer. I'm really trying to stick to a tighter budget, so would you be able to do $1,350?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your interest and persistence. I can meet you halfway and offer the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV to you for $1,375. It's a great price for a premium TV like this.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you meeting me halfway. I'm really trying to stick to $1,350. Would you be able to do that?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget considerations. I can agree to sell you the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV for $1,350. It's a great deal for a top-of-the-line TV like this.
